title: moeru-ai/airi
friendlyTitle: Airi is a self-hosted AI companion project
summary: Airi is a self-hosted, cross-platform AI companion project supporting real-time voice interaction and integrations including Minecraft and Factorio. It is available for web, macOS and Windows, and has drawn significant GitHub attention.
friendlySummary: Airi is an open-source project for making an AI companion that can talk by voice and connect with some games. It works on the web, Mac and Windows.
whyItMatters: For developers exploring local or self-owned companion interfaces, Airi is a substantial reference implementation for voice, character interaction and game integrations. Treat it as an experimental platform and review its model, privacy and moderation choices before deployment.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Developers can study it to learn about voice AI and self-hosted companions. Check privacy and safety settings before using it with personal information.
